case_title: KAM PUI LAI VS. CHRISTIAN PIRVAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, KAM PUI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIRVAN, CHRISTIAN $2,210.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,270.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE WAS A TOTAL LOSS WITH A VALUE OF $3100.00, AND ALSO DETERMINES LOSS OF USE DAMAGES TO BE $300.00. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PIRVAN, CHRISTIAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PIRVAN, CHRISTIAN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, KAM PUI AS TO DEFENDANT PIRVAN, CHRISTIAN
CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD RETURNED, SERVED ON DEFT ON 3/24/08. ANOTHER PROOF OF SERVICE IS ALREADY ON FILE.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY LAI, KAM PUI AS TO DEFENDANT PIRVAN, CHRISTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
